title: Online migration with dual-write and backfill

difficulty.rationale: Requires phased migration choreography, dual-write/read consistency, idempotent resumable backfill, cutover gating, and rollback safety under concurrent writes.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /migration/start enters dual_write and keeps endpoints available.
POST /migration/backfill is resumable and reports backfill_complete.
POST /migration/cutover succeeds only after backfill completes.
must_not: Clobber rows updated concurrently during backfill.
edge_cases: PATCH during backfill preserves the newer normalized value.
Rollback clears normalized fields and restores legacy reads.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-server-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
